attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
WATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
WATL.AR_TRX_KEY,
WATL.BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
WATL.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
WATL.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
WATL.BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER,
WATL.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE,
WATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE,
WATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
WATL.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE,
WATL.BK_SAF_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
WATL.BK_SAF_COMPANY_CODE,
WATL.BK_SAF_ID_INT,
WATL.APPLIED_TRANSACTION_TYPE,
WATL.AR_TRX_ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ROLE,
WATL.AR_TRX_LINE_CREATION_DATETIME,
WATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,
WATL.SS_CODE ,
WATL.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME ,
WATL.EDW_CREATE_USER ,
WATL.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME ,
WATL.EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
WATL.AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_DESCR,
WATL.RU_XAAS_PREPAYMENT_FLG,
/* Q3FY16 -  XAAS 
WATL.RU_BK_XAAS_SALES_ORDER_ID_INT,
WATL.RU_XAAS_SALES_ORD_SS_CD,
/* SHIP_TO_CUST change in Q2FY15 LSS */
WATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
/* Q1FY16 -  XAAS */
WATL.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT,
WATL.SUBSCRIPTION_CD,
WATL.RU_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_FLG,
/* Q3FY16 -  XAAS */
WATL.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY,
WATL.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID,
WATL.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY,
WATL.CHANGED_ATO_CHILD_PRDT_KEY,
/*ADDED AS PART OF EA MIGRATION Q4FY19 - SIGORANT*/
WATL.MIGRATED_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
WATL.MIGRATED_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
WATL.MIGRATED_ORDER_CLSFCTN_CD
,WATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME /*ADDED AS PART OF ICPM Q3FY20*/
,WATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD
,WATL.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME /*ADDED AS PART OF ATHENA Q2FY21*/
,WATL.CX_EA_PROGRAM_TRX_TYPE_NAME 
,WATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT
FROM
$$WORKDB.W_AR_TRX_LINE WATL
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NARTLN
WHERE WATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NARTLN.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
